title: Anagram 18 Inch LOL Surprise Round Foil Balloon (One Size) (May Vary)
features: Are you looking for a gift or decoration for a children's birthday? Then this LOL Surprise foil balloon from Amscan is just the thing for you
Standard Congrats Grad Owl S40 Packed 17 in
It is made from a special film and has a self-closing valve. You can fill the balloon several times
The Amscan balloon comes unfilled and can be filled with air and helium. It lasts up to several weeks when inflated
Other beautiful decorative items and party accessories can be found in our brand shop. Click on the brand name amscan below the product title
description: Get some fun balloons for all your special occasions! We have films in all possible shapes and sizes as well as all the latex packs you need!
